title: Create ToolRegistry: tool registration, listing, description generation
acceptance_criteria: ToolRegistry class with private Map<string, ToolDefinition>
register(tool: ToolDefinition): void — adds tool to registry
get(name: string): ToolDefinition | undefined — retrieves by name
list(): ToolDefinition[] — returns all registered tools
getAllDescriptions(): string — generates formatted text listing all tool names, descriptions, and parameters
Duplicate registration (same name) overwrites previous tool
